session.user: Run the following command and report results: uv run pytest tests/unit/cli/test_project_config.py -x -v
session.assistant: I'll run the pytest command for you and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run pytest on test_project_config.py with verbose and stop-on-first-failure flags
